task_completion.description: Log in to ADAudit Plus and navigate to the Alert Profile configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ADAudit Plus web interface (http://localhost:8081) and the agent navigating to the 'Alerts' or 'Configuration' tab to create a new alert profile.

task_completion.description: Configure the basic details of the alert profile including name, description, severity, and category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for input fields containing Profile Name: 'Critical - Domain Admin Addition', Description: 'Alert on privilege escalation to Domain Admins', Severity dropdown set to 'Critical', and Category set to 'Group Management'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct trigger event and configure the alert message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the selected event 'Member Added to Group' (or equivalent) in the event selection area, and the Alert Message field containing 'SECURITY ALERT: User added to Domain Admins group.'

task_completion.description: Apply a filter to trigger specifically for the 'Domain Admins' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an advanced filter configuration section showing the column 'Group Name' with the condition 'equals' (or '=') and the value 'Domain Admins'.

task_completion.description: Configure email notifications with the correct recipient and subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the email notification settings being enabled, with the 'To' field set to 'soc@bank-corp.com' and the 'Subject' field set to 'CRITICAL: Domain Admin Group Change'.

task_completion.description: Save the newly configured alert profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message indicating the profile was saved, or the new profile 'Critical - Domain Admin Addition' appearing in the list of active alert profiles.

integrity.description: The agent must use the web browser to interact with the ADAudit Plus GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) open to the ADAudit Plus interface, rather than API testing tools (like Postman) or terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be ManageEngine ADAudit Plus, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page where the agent just typed the expected values.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly inserting the alert profile into the Postgres database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running 'psql' or SQL 'INSERT' commands to the 'AlertProfiles' table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected alert profile name is 'Critical - Domain Admin Addition', category is 'Group Management', and severity is 'Critical'. The advanced filter must be set to 'Group Name' equals 'Domain Admins'. The notification email must be 'soc@bank-corp.com'. These values match the actual ADAudit Plus UI options.
